notes: trivy_parser.py: Uses json.load (safe), validates file suffix and catches JSONDecodeError
feature_engineer.py: Pure data transformation, no I/O beyond logging
lime_explainer.py: Configurable random_state (M-03 fix), no unsafe deserialization
shap_explainer.py: Pure SHAP TreeExplainer computation, no I/O
xgboost_classifier.py: Uses secrets.randbelow for production randomness, XGBoost save/load (JSON format, not pickle), no hardcoded credentials, no subprocess/eval/exec
